decision_commentary: All 7 required fields present per schema. Completeness scores 4 (not 5): 7 of 8 rubric-required topics covered — project type, budget, timeline, location, special requirements, design style, and site ownership questions are all present; however, 'approximate size' as a standalone topic is not explicitly a separate question (the project_type_question touches on it implicitly). This is a minor gap — score 4 rather than 5. Note: sent_to=null is a data issue (no email address populated) but this is expected in test mode from seed data. Accuracy 5: questions are tailored to the residential_in_development context — specifically references 'fraccionamiento' and HOA covenant in design_style_question, demonstrating project-type adjustment. Clarity 5: questions are warm and conversational in Spanish — '¿Cómo describiría el estilo de vida...?' — not a bureaucratic form. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: sent_at='2026-03-17T10:00:00-07:00' within same session as lead creation. Language 5: all questions in Spanish, matching inbound Spanish message exactly. Decision readiness 5: questions will produce responses sufficient for a complete fit assessment. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at questionnaire dispatch — Celia fires after DG-02 fit assessment review.
